triggerTimingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full-version trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Measures 38-41 are relabeled as 38 / 38.2 / 38.3 / 38.4, with Trigger 8 landing at 38.3. Trigger Point 2 remains locked to 00:11.912 in the tour-cut electronics master. The master truncates Trigger 5, crossfades into Trigger 8, and rejoins the source at Trigger 11. Trigger Point 1 starts at 00:02.000 in the file. All later clips start at their beat-mapped tour-cut onsets and end 2 beats after the next surviving trigger.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: Darkness opens from stage left and only gradually reaches the far-right edge.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Leads the first glint at the far-left edge.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Answers just right of the opening spark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: A low ember wakes after the sopranos.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass arrives last, kept deliberately restrained.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: A small right-side shimmer catches only near the end.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge barely speaks before Trigger 2.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: Measures 11–19 become a field of hard max-brightness glitter, thrown in fast irregular cuts across the ensemble.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Upper-left flashes initiate the glitter swarm.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Sop-L2 interlocks with Sop-L1 in upper-left hard glitter.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The middle-left becomes a restless engine of full-power irregular cuts.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass anchors the glitter with the deepest max-brightness strikes.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle replies arrive as bright, clipped sparks.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge throws back the latest and brightest hard sparks.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: The glare breaks into a soft right-to-left retreat with long afterimages.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Receives only the last remnant of the retreat.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Lights after the altos, then falls back into dark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Carries the center of the decrescendo for the longest span.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: A grounded low glow lingers under the receding wave.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Starts the retreat with a soft but clear right-side lead.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge speaks first, then withdraws fastest.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: A compact pulse ignites from the middle and flicks outward in one compressed gesture.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Catches the outermost left splash at the end.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Supports the left-hand rebound after the central burst.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The first clear ignition appears in the center-left.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass answers the central pulse with a short low bloom.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: The right-middle receives the pulse after the center.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge takes the final flick outward.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: The ensemble narrows into a held threshold, preparing the cut-bridge.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Holds a narrow left edge of light.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Keeps the left-center suspended just under the sopranos.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Acts as the center seam of the threshold.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass stays dim and grounded, barely moving.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge becomes the faintest active contour.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: A denser bridge crest sweeps right-to-left, still strictly max-brightness or off.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Receives the returning sweep last, after the center has already flashed.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Upper-left joins late in the return sweep.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor catches the wave after the altos but before the sopranos.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass carries the heaviest middle-stage cuts.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle launches the sweep with repeated bright cuts.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge begins the crest in the starkest cuts.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: The chorus return begins with the piece’s only fully unified slow glow, then the six staves separate again.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Starts in perfect unison with the ensemble, then peels left.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Shares the same opening glow before separating slightly later.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The center seam of the unified glow stays bright longest.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass anchors the common ramp and releases toward the floor.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: The right-center keeps the opening glow and then drifts outward.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge breaks away last, completing the split.

events.timingNote: Tour-cut trigger bundle preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 2 remains anchored to 00:11.912. The tour-cut electronics master truncates full Trigger 5, crossfades into truncated Trigger 8, then rejoins the original source at Trigger 11.

lighting.summary: From measure 115 onward, every light entrance is locked to actual light-chorus note onsets and released only by silence.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: Every flash is locked to actual note onsets from measure 115 onward, with no interpolated swell between attacks.

lightingDesignNote: Tour-cut six-staff torch choreography preserving full trigger identities 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12. Trigger Point 11 begins with the piece's only fully unified slow glow before the staves separate again; Trigger Point 12 is strictly locked to light-chorus note onsets.
